title: Docusaurus
excerpt: description: Create a Docusaurus application and deploy it to Cloudflare Workers with Workers Assets. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. **Start from CLI**: Scaffold a Docusaurus project on Workers, and pick your template. npm create cloudflare@latest -- my-docusaurus-app --framework=docusaurus
